subject: A&AI health check improvement:
commit_message:
A&AI health check improvement:

Issue-ID: AAI-3123
Change-Id: Ib3d53712b0ad3a0e73e4eed931bde0b301eb50a4
Signed-off-by: Nagendra90287 <nagendrakumar.pal@amdocs.com>

Change-Id: I36b3914e829485d0137e532f84d1569e710ca428
Signed-off-by: Nagendra90287 <nagendrakumar.pal@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (3 comments)

Hi Daniel,
Below the explanation for all the 3 comments:

Line 15: should the main version be updated to 14 if you are updating the health check?  This can be updated as 14 however this is not impacting Health Check.

Line 27: why not just run a delete if needed and then always run resource api call after? The logic here we implemented is like first check if there is dummy model detail already exists then delete it else run put request to create model data followed by Get and Delete dummy model detail

Line 56: its not clear to me what this does over just calling AAI.Run Put Request directly in the test case you want to run.    Here we are check Traversal Micro Service with Put request to AAI inventory. This Put request Provides an count of the objects returned in the query and in our case object is "Count". It's documentation can be found at "https://onap-aai-aai-common.readthedocs.io/en/stable/AAI%20REST%20API%20Documentation/customQueries.html"

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > (3 comments)
> 
> Hi Daniel,
> Below the explanation for all the 3 comments:
> 
> Line 15: should the main version be updated to 14 if you are updating the health check?  This can be updated as 14 however this is not impacting Health Check.
> 
> Line 27: why not just run a delete if needed and then always run resource api call after? 

The logic here we implemented is like  send a Get request to check :
1.if there is dummy model details already exists then delete it 
and run put request to create model data followed by Get and Delete dummy model details
2.if there is no dummy model details available then do a Put request with dummy model details followed by Get and Delete dummy model details
> 
> Line 56: its not clear to me what this does over just calling AAI.Run Put Request directly in the test case you want to run.    Here we are checking Traversal Micro Service with Put request to AAI inventory. This Put request Provides an count of the objects returned in the query and in our case object is "Count". It's documentation can be found at "https://onap-aai-aai-common.readthedocs.io/en/stable/AAI%20REST%20API%20Documentation/customQueries.html"

yes you have described some explanations, but for instance Run Delete dummy data and perform resource API check is not a very good method is not reusable to others - so i suggested away to fix it. Your stuff may work but does not build a reusable interface for others looking to use the aai_interface file for their tests.

(2 comments)

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4: Verified+1 Code-Review+2
> 
> (2 comments)

Hi Daniel,

Yes this is a part of health check.
In one of meeting(I believe meeting was with Upstream team) we received below comment:

AAI

    one of most important health checks – returns 200 to health check end point…a little weak.

So we checked with AAI developers for suggestions and we got input to implement Resource API and Traversal API.
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as da8e4c387c06cd481964169a5612e2905abfb6b7 by Morgan Richomme
